title: Dang Shen Bu Rang
titleNative: 当神不让
synopsis: Yang Jian is exiled into the human realm from the Heavens in order to repent. His former partner, The Howling Celestial Hound, has reincarnated into a young girl. Witness how a barbaric Immortal from the Heavens and his partner move 100 demons to tears.

title: GoWest: Overworked
titleNative: 大侠请上功
synopsis: Fifty years ago, the martial arts world was suddenly invaded by the “Hun Dun”. Murong Qiong established the Demon Sect to resist it, but they couldn’t manage to win despite arduous battles. The Divine Messenger Yi Zhihua descended and taught everyone the cultivation method of demonization, and they finally managed to defeat the Hun Dun. However, after the Divine Messenger left, the cultivation method went out of control as it spread in the martial arts world. Disappointed, Murong Qiong retired and his subordinate Yu Huabing seized the power, improved the cultivation method, and created an era of Punk True Qi, making the martial arts world thrive. But the price of prosperity was that all the cultivators became “Shang Gong fanatics”. Dongfang Sheng, harboring an idealistic and sincere aspiration, found Murong Qiong secluded in the Westward Restaurant. He hoped that Murong Qiong would assist in restoring the glory of the martial arts world.The comical story thus began... (Source: Bilibili

title: Cang Lan Jue 2
titleNative: 苍兰诀 第二季

title: Douzhan Tianxia
titleNative: 斗战天下
synopsis: The mysterious young man Dafeng rescued Li Huamei, who was seriously ill after being plotted against. Dafeng wanted to go to Kyoto to find his senior sister and happened to be on the same road with Li Huamei. On the way, Li Huamei was shocked to find that her senior sister was the Queen Qin Zhao, and the Queen repeatedly sent assassins to kill her. In order to find out the reason, Dafeng and Li Huamei entrusted their lives to each other and fought against the enemy together. Disputes arose in the rivers and lakes, and the court struggles became more intense. The two were unknowingly involved in a treacherous conspiracy, and Dafeng was the key to solving all the mysteries...

title: Aikatsu! x PriPara THE MOVIE -Deai no Kiseki-
titleRomaji: Aikatsu! x PriPara THE MOVIE -Deai no Kiseki-
titleNative: アイカツ！×プリパラ THE MOVIE -出会いのキセキ-
synonyms: Aikatsu! × Pripara THE MOVIE -การพบพานแห่งปาฏิหาริย์!-
synopsis: Akari Oozora and Laala Manaka. Two idols shining in their own worlds suddenly find themselves on the same stage! A magical encounter between two worlds that was never supposed to intersect: Aikatsu and PriPara ! The idols of Starlight Academy and Parajuku were enjoying a dream collaboration at the joint live festival, but before they knew it the outside world was in big trouble..!? The perfect stage packed with excitement and glitter! Everyone's friends, everyone's idols — their idol activities begin right here! (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: Jigu-eui Juin-eun Goyang-ida
titleNative: 지구의 주인은 고양이다
synonyms: 地球の主人は猫にゃん
synopsis: Though Chichi the cat looks very cute, she has one goal: eradicate humanity and take over the world! She decides to recruit comrades to aid her in her quest, but it looks like world conquest won't be that easy?! Follow the adventures of Chichi the tyrant, Dunno the doggo who loves humans, and Kaiser Kang Taeshik, the hard-boiled wild hamster, as they face many hardships on their path to absolute dominion! (Source: Kakao Entertainment Corp., translated)

title: HIDARI
titleNative: 左
synopsis: A skilled carpenter/sculptor Jingoro, gets set up by his disciples and loses his right arm and his father in an "accident" during the reconstruction of the Edo Castle. A few decades later… Jingoro is continuing his journey of revenge with his partner “Sleeping Cat” and his weaponized prosthetic arm. People have come to call him Jingoro "Hidari," which means "left" in Japanese. Jingoro defeats all the foes that has betrayed him, but he learns that Tokugawa Shogunate was behind the murderous event. He searches for clues on who was behind the whole set up, and fights with an army of mechanical soldiers along the way. Finally he confronts the mastermind behind all the killings, but first, he must save the city of Edo by stopping the Edo Castle, now turned into a gigantic weapon of mass destruction! (Source: Official Website)

title: Entotsu-machi no Poupelle: Yakusoku no Tokei-dai
titleRomaji: Entotsu-machi no Poupelle: Yakusoku no Tokei-dai
titleNative: えんとつ町のプペル 〜約束の時計台〜
synonyms: Poupelle of Chimney Town: The Clock Tower of Promise
synopsis: Sequel to Entotsu-machi no Poupelle . After losing his friend Poupelle, young Lubicchi wanders into a mysterious realm where a clock in a tower is frozen at 11:59. To return home, he must restart it – and find the courage to believe again. (Source: Berlin International Film Festival)

title: Hinagiku no Jinsei
titleNative: ひな菊の人生
synopsis: “Daisy's Life” follows the emotional journey of a six-year-old girl named Daisy, who loses her mother in a tragic accident and struggles to adapt to life with her aunt. One sleepless night, she encounters a mysterious girl named Dahlia at her window. Their days together begin to transcend time and space, bringing a cosmic perspective to Daisy's modest life in a downtown yakisoba restaurant. (Source: Variety)

title: Tenmaku no Jaadugar
titleNative: 天幕のジャードゥーガル
synopsis: Eight centuries ago, in the latter days of the Islamic golden age, a young girl arrived in the Khwarazmian city of Tus. She was a slave. But she learned. Eight centuries ago, the Mongols blazed across the map, swept Khwarazm into the ash heap of history, and took all they desired from the ruins. They took the girl who learned. So begins the true story of how a “witch,” wielding knowledge as her only weapon, came to hold the greatest empire the world has ever known in the palm of her hand… (Source: Yen Press)
